---
title: "MoE Router"
subtitle: "Route each token to the expert selected for it."
description: "A browser mini-game from MLSysBook Playground. Route incoming tokens to the correct experts before they expire."
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/games/common.css">
          <script type="module">
            import "/assets/games/runtime.mjs";
            import "/assets/games/moe.mjs";
          </script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="mlsp-game-container" role="region" aria-label="MoE Router mini-game">
  <canvas id="mlsp-canvas" class="mlsp-game-canvas" width="680" height="460"></canvas>
  <div class="mlsp-game-hud">
    <span class="mlsp-score">dropped <span id="mlsp-dropped">0</span> · score <span id="mlsp-score">0</span></span>
    <span>press <kbd>1</kbd>-<kbd>4</kbd> to route the next token · avoid routing errors · <kbd>R</kbd> retry</span>
    <button type="button" class="mlsp-fullscreen-btn" onclick="this.closest('.mlsp-game-container').requestFullscreen()" title="Full Screen" aria-label="Full Screen">⛶</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="mlsp-aha-slot"></div>

<script>
(function bootMoe(){
  function tryBoot() {
    if (!window.MLSP || !MLSP.games || !MLSP.games.moe) return setTimeout(tryBoot, 30);
    var canvas = document.getElementById("mlsp-canvas");
    var $score = document.getElementById("mlsp-score");
    var ahaSlot = document.getElementById("mlsp-aha-slot");
    var pendingResult = null;
    var resolvedApi = null;

    Promise.resolve(MLSP.games.moe(canvas, {
      onScoreChange: function(s) { $score.textContent = s.score; },
      onGameOver: function(result) {
        if (resolvedApi) attachAha(resolvedApi, result);
        else pendingResult = result;
      },
      onRetry: function() { window.location.reload(); }
    })).then(function(api) {
      resolvedApi = api;
      if (pendingResult) attachAha(api, pendingResult);
    });

    function attachAha(api, result) {
      MLSP.showAhaCard(ahaSlot, api.ahaLabel, api.ahaText, api.ahaLink);
    }
  }
  tryBoot();
})();
</script>
```

## How to play
Tokens arrive colored for a specific expert. Press <kbd>1</kbd>, <kbd>2</kbd>, <kbd>3</kbd>, or <kbd>4</kbd> to route the oldest token to that expert before it reaches the bottom. A wrong route is a routing error.

## The Systems Concept
Mixture-of-Experts models route each token to one or more specialized subnetworks. This version teaches the basic routing idea: the router must send each token to the expert selected for it. A fuller version should add expert capacity, queueing, and dropped-token penalties to teach load balancing.

---

*Part of [MLSysBook Playground](/games/). Found a bug? [Report an issue](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new?labels=bug&title=Bug+in+Game).*
